checklist_items.scope_warning: The current evidence is explicitly downgraded to representative/current-trace scope. No SAT-complete or polynomially faithful reduction certificate is present.

The current executable witness covers one deterministic public unit-propagation DPLL fixture with polynomial overhead accounting. No universal-machine compiler or arbitrary-solver polynomial overhead proof is present.

A finite universal trace vocabulary is totally typed C/V/X with explicit UNCLASSIFIED residue fallback. Native instructions are not silently accepted; they must compile into this vocabulary or become residues.
This replays the no-public-extractor condition over the current accepted pure-C traces only; arbitrary polynomial-time no-escape still depends on the remaining bridge obligations.
This is a bounded search over current accepted trace artifacts with positive X-surface controls; it is not a polynomial-size lower bound for the hidden e33 family.
This defines the visible V certificate shape and proves the current accepted traces have zero V obligations; it does not prove arbitrary solver traces have no V wall crossings.

The ledger closes the current accepted trace surface but explicitly blocks full separation on encoded-family completeness, arbitrary solver universality, universal pure-C no-escape, polynomial X-extractor lower bound, and arbitrary V accounting.

current_accepted_trace_surface.meaning: The current accepted trace artifacts pass schema, totality, pure-C no-escape, bounded X search, and V accounting checks.

decision.reason: Full separation remains blocked by unresolved bridge obligations.

next_highest_yield_item.action: Lift pure-C no-escape from current accepted traces to the universal trace vocabulary.

remaining_gaps.gap: The encoded family is now explicitly scoped to representative/current-trace evidence. No SAT-complete or polynomially faithful reduction certificate is present.
remaining_gaps.needed: Reduction certificate with source problem, target encoding, size bound, and inverse witness interpretation.

remaining_gaps.gap: The trace compiler is explicitly scoped to a public DPLL fixture. No universal-machine compiler or arbitrary-solver polynomial overhead proof is present.
remaining_gaps.needed: Compiler theorem or instrumented universal machine with explicit polynomial overhead for arbitrary polynomial-time solvers.

remaining_gaps.gap: Pure-C no-escape is witnessed for current accepted traces, not for every trace over the universal vocabulary.
remaining_gaps.needed: Checker showing pure C traces cannot recover or decide the hidden e33 obstruction.

remaining_gaps.gap: The X search is bounded over current accepted trace artifacts; it is not a polynomial-size lower bound for hidden e33 extractors.
remaining_gaps.needed: Lower-bound argument or explicit recovered hidden-sector map.

remaining_gaps.gap: V accounting is certified for current no-V traces; arbitrary traces with V events still need replayed wall-crossing certificates.
remaining_gaps.needed: Wall-crossing certificates with public boundary, commutator witness, and replay check.
